scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w @petpal/api" "npm run dev -w @petpal/web"
scripts.dev:with-sim: concurrently -n api,web,sim -c cyan,green,yellow "npm run dev -w @petpal/api" "npm run dev -w @petpal/web" "npm run dev -w @petpal/simulator"
scripts.start: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,green "npm run start -w @petpal/api" "npm run start -w @petpal/web"
scripts.start:with-sim: concurrently -n api,web,sim -c cyan,green,yellow "npm run start -w @petpal/api" "npm run start -w @petpal/web" "npm run start -w @petpal/simulator"
